name: shelter
description: A small, self-hosted deployment control plane for a single VPS.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @shelter/web && npm run build -w @shelter/server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @shelter/server" "npm run dev -w @shelter/web"
scripts.test: npm run test:install && npm run test -w @shelter/server && npm run test -w @shelter/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @shelter/server && npm run typecheck -w @shelter/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
